sectionTitle.title:
Centralized RFQ Management
For Construction Teams
sectionTitle.description: Don't waste time sending quote requests one by one. BuilderTek RFQ replaces manual, repeatable, auditable processes for collecting and comparing quotes without leaving your project environment.

features.title: Generate Fully Structured RFQs In Just A Few Clicks
features.description: Generate RFQs directly from any project. Define scope, line items, quantities, pricing units, and due dates, then attach drawings and specifications so vendors receive complete, consistent information.

features.title: Send Secure And Trackable Invitations
features.description: Send RFQs to one or multiple vendors with secure, email-based links—no portals or extra logins required. Track when RFQs are sent, viewed, and responded to in real time.

features.title: Consistent, Standardized Format For Clear Comparisons
features.description: Ensure all vendor responses follow the same structure, making it easy to compare pricing, scope, and compliance side by side.

features.title: Complete Pricing Visibility And Seamless Handoff
features.description: Finalize awards directly from the RFQ and seamlessly convert approved quotes into purchase orders or contracts.

section.title: Bring Structure And Confidence To Your
section.description: Gives your team a clear, repeatable way to work with vendors at reduced risk and better accuracy. Strengthen cost control across the project.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.subtitle: Explore Answers to Frequently Asked Questions about BuilderTek.

items.question: How does BuilderTek streamline the bidding process for subcontractors and vendors?
items.answer: BuilderTek centralizes the entire RFQ workflow . From creating and sending RFQs to subcontractors, you can collect, compare, and award bids through our RFQ module. It helps with structured pricing, real-time status tracking, and side-by-side comparisons, which eliminates manual follow-ups and reduces bid turnaround time.

items.question: Do my subcontractors and vendors need a BuilderTek account to submit bids?
items.answer: No. Subcontractors and vendors can submit bids securely through email or shared links without needing a full BuilderTek account.

items.question: Do I need a separate estimating software after receiving vendor bids?
items.answer: No. BuilderTek allows you to review, compare, and analyze bids directly within the RFQ module, reducing the need for additional estimating tools.

items.question: How does BuilderTek simplify communication with subcontractors and vendors?
items.answer: All RFQ-related communication is centralized in one place, including clarifications, updates, and document sharing, ensuring transparency and faster responses.

items.question: Can BuilderTek RFQ be used for both residential and commercial projects?
items.answer: Yes. BuilderTek RFQ is designed to support both residential and commercial construction projects of any scale.
